Ctrl K MQ Your move briefing AI-generated You're planning a move to Colorado in the next one to three months, and you'll need to handle some important paperwork—including updating your address with the post office, registering your vehicle with Colorado's DMV, and setting up electric service at your new rental. Since you have pets and need storage, you'll want to research pet policies at your new place and lock in storage early, and you should also plan time to sort out your tax filing address and any ID updates before you go. 1 Set up mail & postal It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move. 2 Set up tax (irs) It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move. 3 Set up dmv It's one of the essentials most people need in place around a move.
